form.formComment: Last start 9th (Sr2) over 1780m at this track, beaten 24 m by Punters Jewel (2:08.10) in 3yo+ NR 48 to 55 on April 2 at $71. Two runs back 9th (Fr1) over 1780m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 13 m by Sweet Agenda (2:09.30) in 3yo+ NR 55 to 65 on March 25 at $34. Must do a lot more.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 7th (Fr3) over 1660m after showing early speed at Albion Park, beaten 14 m by Rock Hammer (1:56.70) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better on March 14 at $2.10. At the previous start 12th (Sr5) over 2138m at Albion Park, beaten 25 m by Cool Night (2:30.90) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better on March 7 at $14. Better placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced after the start when Beach Magic broke. Race 7
Had difficulty in securing clear running over the final stages.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr7) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 19 m by Miss Froufrou (1:55.80) in 3yo+ NR up to 65 on March 30 at $4. Heading the right way and is a leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a game effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr7) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 19 m by Miss Froufrou (1:55.80) in 3yo+ NR up to 65 on March 30 at $4. Heading the right way and is a leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked leaving the 300m as a result of Kash Tin breaking gait.
Broke gait shortly after the start, continuing to gallop for some distance.
Commenced a three wide run without cover leaving the 800m point of the event.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Sr3) over 2138m at Albion Park beaten 21 m by Fate Awaits (2:30.10) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better on April 4 at $34. Showed ability the race before when he posted a big 5 m win (Sr1) at this track (2:29.70) beating Docta Feelgood in 3yo+ NR 54 to 62 on March 26 at $6. Chance to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilized the sprint lane in the run to the finish.
Inconvenienced when Little Mickey broke gait.
Had a tendency to hang in at various stages in the race.
